quickActions.dailySalesSummaryHelp: You can ask for daily totals and metrics in chat (not the full list).
quickActions.searchCustomerHelp: You can search customers in chat or go to the Customers screen.
quickActions.showCustomerHelp: You can view a customer in chat or go to the Customers screen.
quickActions.listFiscalDocumentsHelp: You can list fiscal documents in chat or go to Fiscal billing.
quickActions.showFiscalDocumentHelp: You can view a document in chat or go to Fiscal billing.
quickActions.createSaleHelp: You can register a sale in chat or go to the new sale screen.
quickActions.emitInvoiceHelp: You can invoice a sale in chat or go to the sales list.

guides.createProduct:
To create a product I need you to specify:

• Action: "Create product"
• Product name: Sample Product
• Price: 2500 (any amount you choose)
• Initial stock: 30 (any amount you choose)
• Category: optional (must be an existing category, e.g. General)

Full example:
"Create product Sample Product, price 2500, stock 30, category General"
guides.searchProduct:
To search for a product I need you to specify:

• Action: "Search product"
• Search term: name, barcode, or category

Example:
"Search product Sample Product"

You can also go to the Products screen and use the search bar or barcode scanner.
guides.updateProduct:
To update a product I need you to specify:

• Action: "Update product"
• Product: product name or identifier
• Field to change: price, stock, category, etc.
• New value: the updated data

Example:
"Update product Sample Product price 2500"

You can also go to Products, select the item, and edit it on screen.
guides.deactivateProduct:
To deactivate a product I need you to specify:

• Action: "Deactivate product"
• Product: product name

Example:
"Deactivate product Sample Product"

You can also go to Products and deactivate from the actions menu.
guides.updateStock:
To update stock I need you to specify:

• Action: "Add units" or "Update stock"
• Product: product name
• Quantity: units to add or final stock

Example:
"Add 5 units to Sample Product"

You can also use the merchandise intake screen to scan products.
guides.restock:
To receive merchandise you can:

• Go to Merchandise intake and scan products
• Or ask me in chat to update stock for specific products

In chat I need:
• Action: "Add units"
• Product: product name
• Quantity: units to receive

Example:
"Add 10 units to Sample Product"
guides.searchSupplier:
To search for a supplier I need you to specify:

• Action: "Search supplier"
• Search term: name, contact, email, or phone

Example:
"Search supplier Demo Supplier"

You can also go to the Suppliers screen and use the search bar.
guides.createSupplier:
To create a supplier I need you to specify:

• Action: "Create supplier"
• Name: Demo Supplier
• Contact: optional (reference name)
• Email: optional
• Phone: optional
• Address: optional

Example:
"Create supplier Demo Supplier contact Jane Doe phone +15551234567"

You can also go to the new supplier screen.
guides.updateSupplier:
To update a supplier I need you to specify:

• Action: "Update supplier"
• Supplier: supplier name
• Field to change: email, phone, contact, etc.
• New value: the updated data

Example:
"Update supplier Demo Supplier email orders@demo.com"

You can also go to Suppliers and edit on screen.
guides.dashboardSummary:
To view a dashboard summary I need you to specify:

• Action: "Dashboard summary" or "View dashboard"

Example:
"Dashboard summary"

You can also go to the main Dashboard for sales, alerts, and business metrics.
guides.lowStock:
To check low-stock products I need you to specify:

• Action: "Low stock products" or "Low stock"

Example:
"Low stock products"

You can also go to the Products list filtered by low stock or restock from Merchandise intake.
guides.listSales:
To list individual sales I need you to specify:

• Action: "Show sales" or "Recent sales"
• Optional filter: "Sales today" or "Sales yesterday"

Examples:
"Show sales"
"Sales today"

For daily totals (not a list), use "Sales summary for today" or "Sales of the day".

You can also go to the Sales list and filter by date.
guides.showSale:
To view a sale I need you to specify:

• Action: "Show sale"
• Sale number: sale ID

Example:
"Show sale #13"

You can also go to the Sales list and open the detail.
guides.dailySalesSummary:
For the daily sales summary I need you to specify:

• Action: "Sales summary for today", "Sales of the day", or "Daily totals"
• Optional date: if you want another day

Example:
"Sales summary for today"

This shows totals and payment breakdown, not each sale.

You can also go to Daily sales for the full analytics screen.
guides.createSale:
To register a sale I need you to specify:

• Action: "Create sale"
• Payment method: cash, card, transfer, etc.
• Products: name and quantity for each item

Example:
"Create cash sale with 2 Sample Product"

You can also go to New sale and register from the POS screen.
guides.emitInvoice:
To invoice a sale I need you to specify:

• Action: "Invoice sale"
• Sale number: sale ID
• Customer: optional (Consumer Final if omitted)

Examples:
"Invoice sale #13"
"Invoice sale #13 for customer Demo Customer"

You can also invoice from the sale detail in the Sales list.
guides.searchCustomer:
To search for a customer I need you to specify:

• Action: "Search customer"
• Search term: business name or document number

Example:
"Search customer Demo Customer"

You can also go to the Customers screen and use the search bar.
guides.showCustomer:
To view a customer I need you to specify:

• Action: "Show customer"
• Customer number: customer ID

Example:
"Show customer #5"

You can also go to Customers and open the customer profile.
guides.listFiscalDocuments:
To list fiscal documents I need you to specify:

• Action: "Show fiscal documents" or "List invoices"

Example:
"Show fiscal documents"

You can also go to Fiscal billing for the full history.
guides.showFiscalDocument:
To view a fiscal document I need you to specify:

• Action: "Show document"
• Document number: document ID

Example:
"Show document #4"

You can also go to Fiscal billing and open the detail.

quickActions.deleteSupplierHelp: You can delete a supplier by specifying its name. Example: "Delete supplier Demo Supplier".
